title: Repair nRF Renode full-app startup
description: Discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.8 runtime audit. Existing nRF Renode models execute lora_ping but full apps fail late: bridge T-Echo stalls after L2 RX thread startup; bridge RAK4631 polls unimplemented USBD EVENTCAUSE with no UART; gateway T-Echo stalls during Bluetooth LMP initialization before CoAP AUTOSTART; puck RAK4631 stalls after LICHEN puck starting before CoAP status traffic. Diagnose model/firmware boundary and make each declared full-app backend reach its existing late runtime oracle without weakening startup behavior.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Bridge T-Echo and RAK4631 reach main ready and an independent L2/radio effect. 2. Gateway T-Echo reaches CoAP AUTOSTART and an independent protocol/radio effect. 3. Puck RAK4631 emits its late CoAP status marker and independent TX. 4. Exact canonical build/run commands, artifact hashes, and logs are retained. 5. No test or runtime oracle is weakened.
notes: T-Echo/RAK/T1000 now reach CoAP AUTOSTART + telemetry post-USBD/BLE model wiring. Renode tests and hetero fleet validated.
close_reason: Repaired nRF full-app startup via USBD/BLE wiring in peripherals, repl overrides, conf re-enable, startup repl macros. R1 Neo and T1000-E models wired via SX1262/LR1110 + GPIO in boards/renode/. Renode sims, west build -t run, hetero fleet all pass with observable TX/CoAP. All oracles preserved.
